summary: STEP 11E+ Ticket B - Shared Upload Workflow Unification testing complete. All 4 upload-type requirements (Right to Work, DBS Certificate, Identity, Proof of Address) are correctly rendering with the unified UploadRequirementCard component. Agreements and References sections continue to use legacy rendering (AgreementRow, ReferenceRow).
context_for_next_testing_agent: STEP 11E+ Ticket B - Shared Upload Workflow Unification complete. UploadRequirementCard is now used for RTW, DBS, Identity, and Proof of Address requirements. Each card shows: (1) Evidence Files section with file previews, (2) Verification Check section with check status, (3) Request lifecycle status, (4) Action buttons (Upload, Request/Resend, View Files), (5) Footer with counters and View History button. Agreements and References sections still use legacy AgreementRow and ReferenceRow components.

upload_requirement_card_rtw.details: Right to Work renders with UploadRequirementCard showing Evidence Files + Verification Check sections, Blocking badge, Upload/Request buttons, View History

upload_requirement_card_dbs.details: DBS Certificate renders with UploadRequirementCard showing Evidence Files + Verification Check sections, Request sent status, Upload/Resend buttons, View History

upload_requirement_card_identity.details: Identity renders with UploadRequirementCard showing Evidence Files + Verification Check sections, Request sent status, Upload/Resend buttons, View History

upload_requirement_card_poa.details: Proof of Address renders with UploadRequirementCard showing Evidence Files + Verification Check sections, '2 files required' note, Request sent status, Upload/Resend buttons

evidence_files_section.details: Each card shows Evidence Files section with file icon, active/pending/historical counters, file previews when files exist

verification_check_section.details: Each card shows Verification Check section with shield icon, check status (verified/pending/no check recorded), Record Check or Update buttons

upload_button_action.details: Upload button opens Upload Document modal with Compliance Requirement dropdown and file upload area

request_button_action.details: Request button opens Request Document modal with employee email and Additional Message field

view_history_button.details: View History button opens history drawer showing audit trail for the requirement

toggle_collapse_functionality.details: Clicking section header toggles expand/collapse state correctly

agreements_legacy_rendering.details: Agreements section uses legacy AgreementRow component with Agreement badge, Blocks Readiness badge, status

references_legacy_rendering.details: References section uses legacy ReferenceRow component with Verified badges, View Response button

data_testids.details: All sections have data-testid attributes: section-right_to_work, section-dbs, section-identity, section-proof_of_address, section-agreements, section-references, upload-requirement-{key}

DualRowComplianceSection.js.lines_216_239: renderUploadSection function correctly uses UploadRequirementCard with all required props
DualRowComplianceSection.js.lines_241_378: renderSection function uses legacy EvidenceRow, CheckRow, AgreementRow, ReferenceRow components
DualRowComplianceSection.js.lines_454_475: Correct routing: RTW/DBS/Identity/PoA use renderUploadSection, Agreements/References use renderSection

UploadRequirementCard.js.lines_22_34: Component accepts all required props: surface, isOpen, onToggle, action handlers, isAuditor
UploadRequirementCard.js.lines_61_83: Uses RequirementSectionShell wrapper with RequirementActionBar for actions
UploadRequirementCard.js.lines_84_214: Evidence Files section with file previews and request status
UploadRequirementCard.js.lines_216_275: Verification Check section with check status and Record/Update actions
UploadRequirementCard.js.lines_277_294: Footer with counters and View History button

surfaceNormalizers.js.lines_179_237: normalizeUploadRequirementSurface correctly transforms backend data to UI surface
